Community orbit model for tracking contributor engagement levels

pros: Pioneered Orbit Model for dev rel metrics
Left useful concepts the industry adopted
Team went on to Common Room and peers
cons: Product is shut down, no future roadmap
Data exports were a migration pain point
No ongoing support or security updates
review.verdict: Historically important but closed; evaluate Common Room or Crowd.dev instead today.
review.best_for: Historical reference when studying developer community analytics categories.
review.not_for: Any team buying a community intelligence tool in 2026.
